elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
Verify the user should be logged in successfully

elements.name: Navigate to Spares list screen

steps.name: verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
verify user navigates to "Spares" list screen
Add "+" button should be visible in Spares list

elements.name: Open Add New Spare popup

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
Spare Name field should be visible
Spare Code field should be visible
Current Stock field should be visible
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Create Spare with all fields

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Current Stock value
newly created Spare should be visible in Spares list screen

elements.name: Create Spare with mandatory fields only

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Current Stock value
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Create Spare with valid decimal stock value

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Create Spare with zero stock value

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen

elements.name: Create Spare with trimmed Spare Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters Spare Name with leading and trailing spaces
User enters valid Current Stock value
system should trim spaces and create Spare successfully
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Create Spare without Spare Name

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Current Stock value
"This field is required" error should be displayed
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Current Stock exceeds 6 digits before decimal

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
stock validation error should be displayed below Current Stock field
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Current Stock has more than 2 decimal places

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
stock validation error should be displayed below Current Stock field
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup

elements.name: Spare Name contains only spaces

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters only spaces in Spare Name
User enters valid Current Stock value
"This field is required" error should be displayed
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Rapid multiple Submit clicks

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Current Stock value
User clicks Submit button multiple times quickly in Spare popup
system should prevent duplicate Spare creation

elements.name: Close popup without saving

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User enters valid Current Stock value
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving Spare data
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Verify Add New Spare popup UI elements

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
Spare Name field should be visible
Spare Code field should be visible
Current Stock field should be visible
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Verify Spares list screen UI

steps.name: each Spare record should show Spare ID
each Spare record should show Spare Name
each Spare record should show Spare Code
each Spare record should show UOM
each Spare record should show Stock value
each Spare record should show Status

elements.name: Verify UOM dropdown options

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
UOM options list should be displayed
User should be able to select one UOM value
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Verify Close X button closes popup

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
popup should be closed without saving Spare data
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list

elements.name: Verify stock validation error message placement

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Spares list screen
"Add New Spare" popup should be displayed
stock validation error should be displayed below Current Stock field
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks on "Yes, Exit" button on the confirmation popup
